description_long: This is a compact, military-style SUV painted in olive drab green with prominent white star insignias on the hood and rear quarter panel, reminiscent of classic World War II Willys Jeeps. The vehicle features an open-top design with two simple beige seats, a minimalist dashboard, and a thin, circular steering wheel. The front grille is vertical with seven slots, flanked by two round headlights, and the hood is flat and angular. The wheels are rugged with deep treads, and a spare tire is mounted on the rear cargo area. The body is boxy and utilitarian, with no visible doors, and the rear cargo bed is open and accessible. The overall construction suggests a robust metal frame with utilitarian finishes, suitable for rough terrain and urban environments alike.
description: A compact, olive green military-style SUV with white star insignias, open top, rugged wheels, and a rear-mounted spare tire. The design is boxy and utilitarian, evoking classic Willys Jeep styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cabin, two beige seats, steering wheel, and rear-mounted spare tire.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the vertical slotted grille, round headlights, and white star on the hood.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the open cargo bed and star insignia on the rear quarter.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the spare tire, open cargo area, and simple rear panel with a small red button detail.
attribute_wheel_design: solid metal wheels with deep-treaded black rubber tires, no visible spokes
